title: An Act relative to the Massachusetts Uniform Commercial Code

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Peisch of Wellesley, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Alice Hanlon Peisch relative to the Massachusetts Uniform Commercial Code.  Financial Services.
